channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 3 factors that will separate the ‘SaaSpocalypse’ winners from losers
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Chinese platforms like Xiaohongshu look to Southeast Asia as the U.S. applies more scrutiny
item.description: In 2025, China’s trade surplus from digital services jumped to a record high of $33 billion, according to data from the State Administration of Foreig...

item.title: How Trump erased the story of George Washington’s slave, Ona Judge, who fled from Philadelphia to freedom
item.description: In late January, the National Park Service dismantled the slavery exhibit at Philadelphia Independence National Historic Park.

item.title: The godfather of AI predicts mass unemployment is on its way. This CEO warns even a 10% reduction ‘will feel like a depression’
item.description: Khan Academy CEO Salman Khan predicts the AI revolution will hit the U.S. faster and harder than anyone is anticipating.

item.title: iOS 26.3—Update Now Warning Issued To All iPhone Users
item.description: Apple has released iOS 26.3 fixing 39 security flaws — one of which is already being used in real-life attacks. Here's what you need to know.

item.title: Comulytic’s Note Pro AI Recorder And Note Taker Includes Free Transcriptions For Life
item.description: Comulytic claims that its Note Pro AI recorder can save users up to 300 hours of time and $238 per year by increasing productivity and lowering transc...

item.title: 7 Million Cancers A Year Are Preventable, Says New Report
item.description: Tobacco smoking, alcohol consumption and infections were the three leading causes of preventable cancers according to research by the World Health Org...

item.title: Why Skyscrapers And Tall Buildings Are Now Being Upcycled
item.description: While demolition has long been the preferred option, more and more designers and owners are now opting to take a more sustainable approach and upcycli...

item.title: Rural America’s $23.6 billion wipeout: the drought that wouldn’t quit
item.description: The Southern Plains have been through it over the last six years—and counting.

item.title: Apple iOS 26.3 — Critical Update Now Live For All iPhone Users
item.description: The next iPhone update is here with new features for all users and key changes for those in the EU.

item.title: What the strategist who angered Bessent now says about the U.S. dollar
SoftBank says it made $4.2 billion on its OpenAI stake in the last quarter
Adyen shares skid on payments company's outlook
Schroders shares surge as Nuveen to buy fund manager in $14 bln deal
Siemens CEO says company's orders 'supercharged' by AI demand
FAA lifts El Paso flight restriction after US disables Mexican cartel drones that 'breached US airspace'
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration walked back an order grounding all flights to and from the El Paso International Airport on Wednesday.

item.title: US economy added 130K jobs in January, delayed report shows
item.description: The U.S. economy added jobs at a steady pace to start the year, as the Labor Department reported that employers hired 130,000 workers in January 2026,...

item.title: Expert credits Trump tax certainty for economic confidence, Americans returning to workforce
item.description: The American workforce rebounds with unexpected job gains in January, signaling economic momentum as labor participation rises across demographics nat...

item.title: Jaguar Land Rover recalling 2,300 electric vehicles in US over fire risk
item.description: Jaguar Land Rover recalled nearly 2,300 I-Pace electric SUVs over a fire risk from overheating batteries, with owners urged to park outside and limit ...

item.title: Housing market cools as price growth hits slowest pace since Great Recession recovery
item.description: The housing market cooled dramatically as home price growth slowed to just 0.9% in December, the weakest pace since the economy was recovering from th...

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
